cause_analysis.narrative: Wild Honey Hair Salon churned on 2026-03-12 after 151 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2025-12-24 via app_chat — 78 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 3 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 78 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 3 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.
[SLA example] On 2026-03-02 via app_chat, client wrote: "732-299-9539…" — no outbound response in 16 days.
[SLA example] On 2026-03-02 via app_chat, client wrote: "Im available now…" — no outbound response in 16 days.
